_comment: Anthropic-shape response WITHOUT a native tool_use block — the model emitted a fenced ```json {"command":..., "args":...} ``` block inside a text block instead. Smaller open-weight models (older llama, some vLLM checkpoints, occasionally local-served Mistral) do this when their tool-calling head isn't reliable. OneShotStrategy.ParseResponse falls back to fence regex, parses the JSON payload, and returns ActionProposal{Command, Args} the same shape the native path produces. The Loop then dispatches via runFallbackTool which synthesizes a tool_use_id and feeds the tool_result back as a normal user-role tool_result block.
